variants.title: Filtrec DMD0011E05B Pressure Filter | Replaces the Mahle PI5111SM6
variants.option1Value: Filtrec DMD0011E05B Pressure Filter | Replaces the Mahle PI5111SM6
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec DMD0011E05B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the DMD0011E05B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Pressure Filter, Media: Glass Fiber, Efficiency 1: 5µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 7µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 47.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 25.5 mm, Length: 246.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 30 bar, Seal Material: Viton, Temperature Range: -25 - +120°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 5µ @ β200, Media Type: Glass Fiber, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 30 BAR, Seal: Viton

variants.title: HiFi Filter SH 84156 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Mahle PI5111SM6
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SH 84156 Pressure Filter | Replaces the Mahle PI5111SM6
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SH 84156 Hydraulic Filter. Engineered to protect and optimize the performance of hydraulic systems, this filter delivers exceptional contamination control. Premium filter media captures fine particles and debris that could compromise system integrity, helping to extend the lifespan of critical hydraulic components. By maintaining fluid cleanliness, it reduces wear and tear while supporting consistent pressure levels throughout the system. Perfect for a wide range of hydraulic applications—from industrial machinery to heavy-duty equipment—this filter provides reliable performance even under high-pressure conditions. Its robust construction ensures long-lasting durability, helping to minimize downtime and maintenance costs while maximizing operational efficiency.

variants.title: Donaldson P567090 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt | Replaces the Mahle PI5111SM6
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P567090 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt | Replaces the Mahle PI5111SM6
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P567090 Hydraulic Filter, Cartridge Dt is engineered with advanced depth filtration technology, offering enhanced dirt retention and fluid cleanliness. It ensures optimal performance in high-pressure hydraulic systems, effectively protecting critical components from wear and extending system life. This filters robust construction and superior filtration efficiency make it ideal for demanding applications. Its reliable performance helps minimize maintenance costs and system downtime, ensuring consistent operation under tough conditions.

variants.option1Value: MicroFit® MFHLP30678 UltraGen III Pressure Filter | Replaces the Mahle PI5111SM6
variants.description: MicroFit® MFHLP30678 UltraGen III Pressure Filter. Engineered and manufactured in Great Britain the MFHLP30166 is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of OEM quality standards, ensuring superior filtration performance and the longest possible filter life. Building on over 50 years of filtration expertise, the UltraGen III series is the third generation of MicroFit® filter media, delivering exceptional efficiency and reliability. FilterFinder is an approved distributor of MicroFit® filters. With expert product knowledge, dedicated support, and a large stock availability, FilterFinder ensures you receive the parts you need when you need them, every time.
